zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carlyle於1419年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald18歲，母親Elizabeth Kirkpatrick18歲。他和Elizabeth Kirkpatrick至少有2個兒子。他去世於1501年在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carlyle于1419年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald18岁，母亲Elizabeth Kirkpatrick18岁。他和Elizabeth Kirkpatrick至少有2个儿子。他去世于1501年在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Carlyle was born in 1419, in Scotland, his father, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, was 18 and his mother, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, was 18. He had at least 2 sons with Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. He died in 1501, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carlyle est né en 1419, à Écosse, son père, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. Il est décédé en 1501, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carlyle 1419 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 18 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Kirkpatrick 18. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Kirkpatrick mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1501 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle è nato il nel 1419 nel Scotland, il suo padre, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. Morì nel 1501, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carlyleが1419年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldは18歳，母Elizabeth Kirkpatrickは18歳であった。彼はElizabeth Kirkpatrickとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1501年に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carlyle(이)가 1419년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Kirkpatrick(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Kirkpatrick(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1501년 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle nasceu em 1419, em Scotland, seu pai, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. Ele faleceu em 1501, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carlyle родился в 1419 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. Он умер в 1501 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carlyle nació en 1419, en Scotland, su papá, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Kirkpatrick, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Elizabeth Kirkpatrick. Murió en 1501, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
